2340400.name: R2BEAT（アールツービート）
2340400.description:
Rhythm Racing Beat, R2BEAT!

The running Rhythm game is back! Enjoy a rhythm game full of speed!

R2BEAT is a game that combines sound games and race games in which characters wearing inline skates run through various courses while avoiding obstacles to the rhythm.

This title was in service in Japan from October 2006 to September 2009, and even after its service was terminated in Japan, it has been enjoyed by many players in Korea, China, and many other countries around the world.

Now, the latest version of the game, with the addition of new songs, is finally returning to Japan as a "racing rhythm game" that combines "rhythm" and "racing"!

The unique world of "R2BEAT" will bring a sense of nostalgia not only to those who have played the game in the past, but also to those who are experiencing it for the first time. R2BEAT" is a highly anticipated revival title that is sure to get everyone hooked on its easy-to-use controls, diverse music, and racing tactics.
2340400.supported_languages: 日语, 英语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
